name: Apple Sorbet
recipeIngredient: -cored and diced (Gravensteins, Jonathans, Spartans are all great)
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the diced apples with lemon juice in a food processor using the steel blade until smooth.
2. Add sugar, apple cider, and/or liquor to the mixture. Continue processing until everything is well blended.
3. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions.
